mapper.sql: userId, type, money, AliAccount, wxCount, transactionNumber, reason, orderNo, status, openId, checkedTime,transactionTime, createTime
mapper.insert:
insert into wallet_detail(
) values ( userId, type, money, AliAccount, wxCount, transactionNumber, reason, orderNo, status, openId, checkedTime, transactionTime, createTime );
mapper.update: update wallet_detail SET userId=#{userId},type=#{type}, money=#{money}, AliAccount=#{aliAccount}, wxCount=#{wxCount}, transactionNumber=#{transactionNumber}, reason=#{reason}, orderNo=#{orderNo}, status=#{status}, openId=#{openId}, checkedTime=#{checkedTime}, transactionTime=#{transactionTime}, createTime=#{createTime} where id=#{id};
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM wallet_detail WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
/*SELECT wd.id,ui.nickName,'提现申请' module,'#modules/sys/walletdetail.html' href,wd.createTime from wallet_detail wd INNER JOIN user_info ui on ui.userId=wd.userId WHERE wd.status=1 and wd.type in (1,2) ORDER BY wd.createTime desc*/
select r.id,r.realName nickName,'提现申请' module,'#modules/sys/walletdetail.html' href,r.createTime from( SELECT w.*, case when w.type = 2 then (select co.phone from coach co where co.coachId = w.userId) else (select ui.phone from user_info ui where ui.userId=w.userId) end as phone FROM wallet_detail w ) r WHERE r.type!=3 AND r.status=1
